title: Wallflower
writer: Reginald Denham, Henry Ephron, Phoebe Ephron
actors: Robert Hutton, Joyce Reynolds, Janis Paige
plot: Joy (Janis Paige) is used to getting male attention, while her step-sister, Jackie (Joyce Reynolds), stands on the sidelines. The pair, who have a strong bond, come home from college and meet the handsome Warren (Robert Hutton) at...
